feed.title: SAMPLE CISA Cybersecurity Advisories (fixture)
feed.subtitle: Bundled offline sample so the suite runs end-to-end. Not live data.

entry.title: Russian Intelligence Phishing Targeting Signal and WhatsApp Accounts (UNC5792, UNC4221)
entry.summary: SAMPLE FIXTURE. FBI and CISA describe phishing campaigns abusing Signal device-linking and theft of Signal Backup Recovery Keys, attributed to UAC-0195 and UAC-0185. For wiring/testing only; replace with the live CISA feed.

entry.title: Critical Vulnerability in Example Industrial Controller (unrelated)
entry.summary: SAMPLE FIXTURE. An unrelated ICS advisory included to demonstrate that the collector filters out advisories with no tracked-actor match.
